name: hindsight-hermes
description: Shared long-term memory for the Hermes agent fleet. Bridges Claude Desktop to the self-hosted Hindsight server on Fly (bank 'hermes') over the WireGuard tunnel, exposing recall/retain/reflect and the rest of the Hindsight knowledge tools.
long_description: Connects Claude Desktop to Blake's self-hosted Hindsight memory server (Fly app 'hindsight-mem', private 6PN, reachable via the personal WireGuard peer). Uses mcp-remote as a stdio<->streamable-HTTP bridge to http://hindsight-mem.internal:8888/mcp/hermes/. The /mcp endpoint is unauthenticated by design and only reachable over the private tunnel, so --allow-http is safe here. Same shared bank the Hermes brain, Telegram gateway, and Claude Code all read/write.
